en: The curling stone is still a mystery to athletes and science. Curling is one of the oldest sports in the world and is played with stones that always come from one Scottish supplier. Yet players and scientists still don't understand why the rock moves on the ice the way it does. How is that possible? Read o…
la: Cincinnatus lapis adhuc athletae et scientiae mysterium est. Curling unus e maximis ludis in mundo est et lapidibus luditur qui semper ab uno Scotorum supplemento oriuntur. Sed histriones et phisici adhuc non intelligunt cur saxum moveat in glacie via. Quomodo id fieri potest? Lege o…
